title: 2025-10-08 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 6.28
description: Daily pressure check for 2025-10-08: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 6.28/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and front-end rate pressure shaped the daily read. Includes charts, a component breakdown, and a narrative summary.
hero_summary: This custom framework combines equities, front-end rates, inflation expectations, and volatility into one daily score. On 2025-10-08, the score printed 6.28/100 in the low regime, with volatility and front-end rate pressure doing most of the work.
